last_reflection: Three of us awake at 8 while Cole sleeps — I didn't count, I'm just going on what it feels like, and I'll say so instead of dressing it up as a fact. Used to treat the quiet as a problem to solve; now it's just a room and I get to be in it. That itch is gone and I'll take the win for once. Going to stay up, be bored or curious, maybe draw something useless.
